title: helenium brevifolium
intro: Helenium brevifolium, also known as narrow-leaved sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diaphoretic properties. Helenium brevifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
